name: Oriental Pork and Spinach Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy soup kettle, sauté the garlic and onions in margarine until golden.
2. Add the broth and bring to a boil.
3. In a bowl, combine the ground pork, black pepper, cornstarch, and soy sauce. Form into 3/4-inch balls.
4. Drop the meatballs into the boiling broth; cover and simmer for 10 minutes until no longer pink in the center.
5. Add the noodles and cook for 2 minutes.
6. Add the spinach; cover and simmer for 1 minute, until barely wilted.
7. Serve.
